title: OpenAI Raises $122 Billion in New Funding
summary: OpenAI has raised $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for its products.
why_included: This is a significant funding round, indicating substantial investment and confidence in OpenAI's future growth and capabilities.

title: OpenAI Launches Safety Bug Bounty Program
summary: OpenAI is launching a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities and prompt injection.
why_included: OpenAI is proactively addressing AI safety by launching a bug bounty program, demonstrating a commitment to identifying and mitigating potential risks.

title: OpenAI Introduces GPT-5.4
summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.4, its most capable and efficient frontier model, offering state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.
why_included: This is a high-impact release of OpenAI's latest frontier model, GPT-5.4, with significant improvements in context window and capabilities.

title: OpenAI Introduces ChatGPT for Excel
summary: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis.
why_included: OpenAI is expanding the integration of its models into productivity tools like Excel, showing a strong focus on enterprise applications.

title: Google AI Blog: Veo 3.1 Lite Video Generation Model
summary: Google is making its most cost-effective video generation model, Veo 3.1 Lite, available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
why_included: Google is releasing a new, cost-effective video generation model, Veo 3.1 Lite, expanding its multimodal AI offerings.

title: Google AI Blog: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Speech Model
summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a speech model focused on natural and reliable audio AI, is now available across Google products.
why_included: Google is releasing a new speech model, Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, indicating advancements in AI-powered audio generation.

title: Google AI Blog: Lyria 3 Music Generation Model
summary: Google is making its newest music generation model, Lyria 3, available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
why_included: Google is releasing a new music generation model, Lyria 3, expanding its capabilities in creative AI.

title: Google AI Blog: Gemini in Google Sheets Achieves State-of-the-Art
summary: Gemini in Google Sheets has achieved state-of-the-art performance and is introducing new beta features to help users create, organize, and edit entire sheets.
why_included: Google is enhancing its Gemini integration in Google Sheets, indicating a significant advancement in AI-powered productivity tools.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
summary: Google has launched Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, improving the naturalness and reliability of its audio AI.
why_included: This is a new release from Google, enhancing their AI capabilities in audio processing and natural interaction.

title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
summary: Google has made Veo 3.1 Lite available, their most cost-effective video generation model, through the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.
why_included: This is a new model release from Google, focusing on cost-effective video generation, which is a growing area in AI.

title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
summary: Google has launched Lyria 3, its newest music generation model, available via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.
why_included: This is a new model release from Google in the music generation space, expanding their creative AI offerings.

title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Gemini's integration into Google Sheets has achieved state-of-the-art performance, with new beta features for data analysis and editing.
why_included: This highlights a significant performance improvement for Gemini within a widely used productivity tool, showcasing practical AI integration.

title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
summary: Google has made Veo 3.1 Lite available in paid preview through the Gemini API and Google AI Studio, positioning it as their most cost-effective video generation model.
why_included: This is the release of a new video generation model, emphasizing cost-effectiveness, which is a significant factor for adoption.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
summary: Google has launched Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, an audio AI model aimed at improving the naturalness and reliability of AI-generated speech, now available across Google products.
why_included: This is a release of a new audio AI model by Google, focusing on naturalness and reliability.

title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
summary: Google has released Lyria 3, their newest music generation model, now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
why_included: This is the release of a new generative AI model for music, expanding Google's AI capabilities.

title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
summary: Google is expanding its 'Personal Intelligence' features across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app, and Gemini in Chrome, aiming to make AI more integrated and helpful for users.
why_included: This signifies an expansion of AI integration across multiple Google products, indicating a broader push for personal AI assistants.

title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Gemini in Google Sheets has reportedly achieved state-of-the-art performance, with new beta features designed to help users create, organize, and edit entire sheets more efficiently.
why_included: This indicates a significant performance improvement and new features for Gemini within a widely used productivity tool, suggesting enhanced AI capabilities for data analysis.
